target: Implement the shared UI state contract and view model used by CLI, tmux-native UX, desktop dashboard, and mobile dashboard.
invariants: The UI must remain a derived supervisory surface, not a second source of truth.
Desktop and mobile must consume the same shared state model.
Neon accents are structural; state color and explicit text remain primary.

steps.task: Define the shared UI state models, pane states, overlays, action result states, and recent event structures under src/tmux_host/state/.
requirements: Keep canonical profile states bounded to ready, degraded, missing, and unknown.
Keep overlays bounded to attached and blocked.
Do not invent dashboard-only state aliases.

steps.task: Implement the state mapper and selectors that convert runtime-facing host data into the shared UI state shape without inventing a second truth model.
requirements: Keep UI mapping derived from observable host/runtime state only.
Do not add visual rendering logic in this packet.

steps.task: Add canonical fixtures and unit tests for ready, degraded, missing, unknown, and blocked overlay cases.
requirements: Use explicit fixtures for anti-drift validation.
Desktop and mobile must be able to consume the same payload shape.
